pois.name: Valdez Cruise Terminal
pois.notes: Small dock near downtown. Walking distance to museums and harbor.

pois.name: Columbia Glacier
pois.notes: Massive tidewater glacier accessible by boat tour from Valdez. Icebergs and wildlife.

pois.name: Valdez Museum
pois.notes: Local history including 1964 earthquake, Gold Rush, and pipeline construction.

pois.name: Worthington Glacier
pois.notes: Road-accessible glacier about 30 miles from Valdez. State recreation site.

pois.name: Valdez Small Boat Harbor
pois.notes: Active fishing harbor. Charter fishing and glacier tour departures.

pois.name: Keystone Canyon
pois.notes: Dramatic canyon with Bridal Veil and Horsetail Falls. 12 miles from town.

pois.name: Old Town Valdez Site
pois.notes: Memorial to the original town destroyed by 1964 earthquake. Interpretive signs.

pois.name: Alaska Pipeline Terminal
pois.notes: Southern terminus of the Trans-Alaska Pipeline. Viewable from distance.

pois.name: Valdez Glacier
pois.notes: Accessible by hiking trail or kayak tour on Valdez Glacier Lake.

pois.name: Shoup Bay State Marine Park
pois.notes: Protected bay with Shoup Glacier, sea otters, and harbor seals.
